narrative: Strait of Hormuz clashes and retaliatory strikes on Iranian energy hubs introduce a geopolitical risk premium as crude firmed toward $96.1; gold higher +0.27% near $4,724; equities +0.76%; DXY -0.13%; VIX 17.2. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence dominates G8 flows (spread 1.601%) as soft Canada jobs data weighs on CAD while RBNZ hike bets support NZD. USD/CAD at 1.3690 reflects the 150bp Fed-BoC carry advantage and domestic data miss. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
